kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC_NEG_API_07 Login API with Invalid Credentials

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/baduser_xyz/wrongpass123 status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Date': 'Mon, 22 Jun 2026 14:14:49 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '32', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'CF-RAY': 'a0fbdc8dcedbdc4f-FRA'} body=Invalid username and/or password

C:\Users\hp5cd\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Call login API with wrong credentials — expect a non-200 response
